case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. FERNANDO SENEGAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 70965075) TO PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2024 CONTINUED TO AUG-13-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70965075) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SENEGAL, FERNANDO DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2024

DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 70965075) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-13-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 73413394)
